_comment: D2 static creator-engagement baselines (PRD-0006 S3). Engagement = (likes + comments + shares + saves) / plays, expressed as a fraction. The HONESTY rule: only `douyin` carries a platform-correct band (referenceOnly:false) because that is the user's real platform and we have a defensible public range for it. Every other platform's band, and any non-engagement metric, is flagged referenceOnly:true so the UI labels it 「参考性、非你所在平台」 and never makes a silent apples-to-oranges comparison. Ranges are documented short-video engagement-rate bands by follower tier (small accounts engage harder); tiers: nano <1k, micro 1k-10k, mid 10k-100k, macro 100k+.
